title: AI Engineer
company_focus: Enterprise job scheduling and automation software
description:
We’re looking for a highly effective Software Engineer who
leverages modern AI tools to dramatically accelerate
development speed, code quality, and problem-solving.

This role is not about training models—it’s about using AI
(e.g., code generation, copilots, agents, and automation
tools) to build better software, faster. You should be
comfortable treating AI as a core part of your workflow.

What You’ll Do

- Use AI-powered development tools (e.g., copilots, code
  assistants, automated testing tools) to design, write, and
  refactor code

- Rapidly prototype and ship features with the help of AI-
  assisted workflows

- Translate product requirements into working software with
  high velocity

- Validate, debug, and improve AI-generated code to production
  standards

- Build internal tools and automations that leverage AI to
  improve team productivity

- Continuously evaluate and adopt new AI tools to enhance
  development workflows

- Collaborate with product and design teams to deliver high-
  quality features quickly

- Maintain strong code quality, testing, and documentation
  practices—even when moving fast

What You’ll Need

- Ability to be a self-starter, self-manager, and leader. You
  know the highest priorities and get them done without
  being told what to do.

- 5+ years of software engineering experience

- Strong proficiency in: .NET 8, C# 9, React, SQL Server

- Demonstrated experience using AI tools (e.g., GitHub
  Copilot, ChatGPT, code generators) in daily development

- Ability to critically evaluate and refine AI-generated
  outputs

- Familiarity with automation tools, scripting, or workflow
  orchestration

- Experience integrating AI APIs into applications

Why JAMS Software:

- This role is for those who want to be creative, make an
  impact, and have the responsibility and authority to get
  things done – at JAMS Software you get all of those.

- 100% remote work environment with colleagues around the
  globe

- Competitive benefits

- 401k program and employer match

- Flexible PTO

- Paid Holidays
responsibilities: Use AI-powered development tools (copilots, code assistants, automated testing) to design, write, and refactor code
Rapidly prototype and ship features with AI-assisted workflows
Translate product requirements into working software with high velocity
Validate, debug, and improve AI-generated code to production standards
Build internal tools and automations leveraging AI to improve team productivity
Evaluate and adopt new AI tools to enhance development workflows
Collaborate with product and design teams to deliver high-quality features
Maintain strong code quality, testing, and documentation practices
use_cases: AI-assisted code generation and refactoring for software development
Internal productivity tools and automations enhanced with AI
AI API integration into enterprise applications
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is a software engineering position that uses AI
tools (copilots, code assistants) to accelerate development,
not to build, train, or deploy AI/ML systems. The engineer
leverages AI as a productivity tool in their workflow rather
than working directly on AI models or systems. Integrating
AI APIs is mentioned as a secondary skill, not the primary
focus.
